title: Large Language Models for Software Vulnerability Detection: A Survey of Methods, Evaluation, and Future Trends
authors: Canpeng Li, Yanghui Tan, Jie Zheng
publish: 2026 International Conference on Generative Artificial Intelligence and Information Security (GAIIS)
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently achieved rapid progress and are being increasingly adopted across a wide range of software engineering tasks. Owing to their strong capabilities in code understanding, natural-language alignment, and generative reasoning, they have emerged as a promising development for software vulnerability detection. Based on the current research landscape and 32 representative studies, this article mainly elaborates from four perspectives: research evolution, methodological design, evaluation practice, and future directions, aiming to advance technological innovation and deliver forward-looking insights. Existing evidence suggests that direct prompting enables fast transfer to vulnerability detection, but its effectiveness remains constrained by benchmark quality, insufficient context, prompt sensitivity, and limited robustness. In contrast, context enhancement, program-analysis guidance, retrieval augmentation, specification-guided reasoning, and collaborative decision-making generally yield more stable improvements in recall, F1 score, and explanatory utility. Overall, the development of software vulnerability detection in the next stage is unlikely to be driven by model scaling alone. Instead, it will depend on the integration of high-quality datasets, structured program evidence, explicit security constraints, and verifiable reasoning pipelines.
title_zh: 面向软件漏洞检测的大语言模型：方法、评估与未来趋势综述
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLMs）近期取得了快速进展，并在广泛软件工程任务中得到日益广泛的应用。凭借其在代码理解、自然语言对齐和生成推理等方面的强大能力，它们已成为软件漏洞检测领域一项有前景的发展。基于当前研究现状和32项代表性研究，本文主要从研究演进、方法设计、评估实践和未来方向四个角度进行阐述，旨在推动技术创新并提供前瞻性见解。现有证据表明，直接提示能够快速迁移至漏洞检测，但其有效性仍受限于基准质量、上下文不足、提示敏感性和鲁棒性有限等问题。相比之下，上下文增强、程序分析引导、检索增强、规范引导推理和协作决策通常能够在召回率、F1分数和解释效用方面带来更稳定的提升。总体而言，下一阶段软件漏洞检测的发展不太可能仅由模型规模驱动，而是将依赖于高质量数据集、结构化程序证据、明确的安全约束和可验证推理流程的集成。

title: Automated Binary Code Analysis Technology Enhanced by Variable Knowledge Graph
authors: Shunda Meng, Bing Xia, Yi Lin, Jiabin Yin
publish: 2026 International Conference on Generative Artificial Intelligence and Information Security (GAIIS)
abstract: With the escalating threats to software supply chain security, binary code analysis plays a critical role in malicious software detection, vulnerability mining, and software composition analysis. However, traditional binary analysis techniques face challenges such as symbol removal, contextual semantic fragmentation, and obfuscation interference. Although emerging large language models (LLMs) possess strong semantic understanding capabilities, they often suffer from hallucinations due to a lack of domain-specific knowledge. This paper proposes an automated binary code analysis technique enhanced by a Variable Knowledge Graph (VKG). The approach first extracts variable-level entities and relationships through decompilation and static analysis, constructing a structured VKG stored in Neo4j. Second, it designs a graph-text joint reasoning engine based on ToG-2 (Think-on-Graph 2.0), which leverages multi-hop retrieval to obtain deep dataflow information from the VKG and integrates external heterogeneous textual knowledge to guide LLMs in interpretable semantic recovery. Experimental results demonstrate that, compared with traditional static analysis tools and pure LLM baselines, this technique improves function identification accuracy by 18.5% and achieves an F1 score of 0.83 in variable semantic recovery, significantly reducing model hallucination rates.
title_zh: 变量知识图增强的自动化二进制代码分析技术
abstract_zh: 随着软件供应链安全威胁日益加剧，二进制代码分析在恶意软件检测、漏洞挖掘及软件成分分析等任务中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，传统二进制分析技术面临符号去除、上下文语义割裂及混淆干扰等挑战。尽管新兴的大语言模型具备强大的语义理解能力，但常因缺乏领域特定知识而产生幻觉。本文提出一种由变量知识图谱增强的自动化二进制代码分析技术。该方法首先通过反编译与静态分析提取变量级实体及关系，构建结构化的变量知识图谱并存储于Neo4j中；其次，基于图思2.0设计图-文本联合推理引擎，通过多跳检索从变量知识图谱中获取深层数据流信息，同时融合外部异构文本知识，引导大语言模型进行可解释的语义恢复。实验结果表明，相较于传统静态分析工具与纯大语言模型基线，该技术在函数识别准确率上提升18.5%，在变量语义恢复任务中F1分数达0.83，显著降低了模型幻觉率。

title: Timing Yield-Driven Clock Skew Scheduling Based on Hybrid Distributions
authors: Kaixiang Zhu, Jiangnan Li, Lingli Wang, Wai-Shing Luk
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: Clock skew scheduling is a cost-effective technique for enhancing synchronous digital VLSI systems. The technique simply involves adjusting the clock skew to meet signal path timing constraints in order to increase the clock frequency or timing yield. Traditionally, Gaussian distributions have been assumed for path delays under process variations. However, this assumption may be inappropriate due to the notable asymmetry of actual path delay distributions. In this paper, we propose the generalized extreme value (GEV) distribution as a potential alternative, along with a hybrid distribution approach that utilizes different distributions for different path delays to improve accuracy. We also analyze three parameter estimation methods: Maximum likelihood estimation (MLE), L-moments, and the method of moments (MoM) to evaluate the accuracy of the fit. Our experimental results show that the GEV distribution more accurately approximates path delays in benchmark circuits, achieving an average improvement of 40% and 30% in the Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS) statistic compared to the Gaussian and Lognormal distributions, respectively. In addition, Q-Q (Quantile-Quantile) and P-P (Probability-Probability) plots are employed to visually validate the goodness-of-fit for different distributions. For timing yield-driven CSS, the hybrid method achieves the highest performance, improving yield by an average of 6% over the Gaussian model and by 2% over the GEV-based model. These results demonstrate that the hybrid distribution approach effectively captures heterogeneous path behavior and provides robust yield optimization.
title_zh: 基于混合分布的时序良率驱动时钟偏差调度
abstract_zh: 时钟偏斜调度是一种用于增强同步数字VLSI系统的经济高效技术。该技术通过调整时钟偏斜以满足信号路径时序约束，从而提高时钟频率或时序良率。传统上，在工艺变化下，路径延迟常假设服从高斯分布。然而，由于实际路径延迟分布存在显著不对称性，这一假设可能不恰当。在本文中，我们提出将广义极值分布作为潜在替代方案，并采用混合分布方法，根据不同路径延迟采用不同分布以提高精度。此外，我们分析了三种参数估计方法：极大似然估计、L-矩法和矩法，以评估拟合的准确性。实验结果表明，在基准电路中，广义极值分布能更准确地逼近路径延迟，相较于高斯分布和对数正态分布，Kolmogorov-Smirnov统计量分别平均提升40%和30%。同时，采用Q-Q图和P-P图对不同分布的拟合优度进行可视化验证。面向时序良率驱动的时钟偏斜调度时，混合方法实现了最高性能，其良率相较于高斯模型平均提升6%，相较于基于广义极值分布的模型提升2%。这些结果表明，混合分布方法能有效捕获路径的异质性行为，并提供稳健的良率优化。

title: A Novel Surrogate Modeling Framework Based on Fast Time-Domain Simulation and Transfer Learning for Signal Integrity Analysis
authors: Meng-Yi Yu, Chang-Sheng Mao, Da-Wei Wang, Wen-Sheng Zhao
publish: IEEE Transactions on Components, Packaging and Manufacturing Technology
abstract: In high-speed electronic systems, signal integrity (SI) issues become increasingly prominent as the operating frequencies rise and integration levels deepen, making accurate SI modeling a key requirement. This paper presents a modeling framework that combines fast time-domain simulation with transfer learning to reduce the computational cost of transient and electromagnetic simulations while building high-accuracy surrogate models. In the source domain, circuit simulation along with the multiple edge response method is used to generate large-scale transient waveforms and worst-case eye diagrams for pretraining neural networks. The target domain uses S-parameters extracted from electromagnetic simulation to construct interconnect models, and transient simulation is performed to obtain high-fidelity output responses. Subsequently, deep neural network and temporal convolutional network are used as surrogate models for geometric parameter-to-eye diagram metrics mapping and input-output waveform mapping tasks, respectively, where the eye diagram metrics include eye height, eye width, and jitter peak-to-peak. The knowledge learned from the source domain is transferred to transient simulation data in the target domain using either fine-tuning or partial-freezing strategies, which further enhance the performance under limited data scenarios, thereby validating the framework’s adaptability and robustness across diverse tasks and system configurations.
title_zh: 一种基于快速时域仿真和迁移学习的新型代理建模框架，用于信号完整性分析
abstract_zh: 在高速电子系统中，随着工作频率的升高和集成度的加深，信号完整性（SI）问题日益突出，精确的SI建模成为关键需求。本文提出一种将快速时域仿真与迁移学习相结合的建模框架，以降低瞬态和电磁仿真的计算成本，同时构建高精度代理模型。在源域中，利用电路仿真与多边沿响应方法生成大规模瞬态波形和最差情况眼图，用于预训练神经网络。目标域采用从电磁仿真中提取的S参数构建互连模型，并通过瞬态仿真获得高保真输出响应。随后，分别使用深度神经网络和时序卷积网络作为几何参数到眼图度量映射以及输入输出波形映射的代理模型，其中眼图度量包括眼高、眼宽和抖动峰峰值。通过微调或部分冻结策略，将从源域学习到的知识迁移至目标域的瞬态仿真数据中，进一步提升了有限数据场景下的性能，从而验证了该框架在不同任务和系统配置下的适应性和鲁棒性。

title: Responsible Integration of Generative AI in Software Engineering Education
authors: Miguel Matey-Sanz, Carlos Granell, Ramón A. Mollineda
publish: IEEE Revista Iberoamericana de Tecnologias del Aprendizaje
abstract: Generative AI (GenAI) is rapidly transforming higher education, requiring a consequent shift in teaching methodologies. This article describes a two-year teaching experience (2024/2025 and 2025/2026) integrating the free, responsible, and critical use of GenAI into a coordinated, complex software development project for fourth-year Computer Science students. The study aimed to explore GenAI’s potential as a learning support tool across the software lifecycle and analyze student interaction patterns. The methodology evolved over two academic years: an initial exploratory phase (2024/2025) was followed by a revised implementation (2025/2026) that incorporated active training seminars focused on prompt engineering and critical analysis. Results show that GenAI is highly effective as a “companion” for automating low-level tasks such as code implementation, debugging, and test scenario specification, allowing students to focus on higher-level design and decision making. Initial findings revealed student frustration when GenAI struggled to reason about advanced project contexts, often due to a lack of prompt expertise. However, the corrective training actions successfully mitigated this frustration, significantly improving the critical interpretation of GenAI-generated outputs and the control of “hallucinations”. Usage patterns were asymmetric, with general-purpose tools dominating early stages and specialized tools gaining relevance as project complexity increased. This experience confirms the value of GenAI in promoting critical and responsible use within software engineering education, supporting a shift from a basic skill focus to one centered on analysis, integration, and high-level problem-solving.
title_zh: 在软件工程教育中负责任地整合生成式人工智能
abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能（GenAI）正迅速改变高等教育格局，要求教学方法随之调整。本文描述了一项为期两年（2024/2025与2025/2026学年）的教学实践，将GenAI的自由、负责任且批判性的使用融入计算机科学专业四年级学生的一个协调性复杂软件开发项目中。研究旨在探索GenAI作为学习支持工具在整个软件生命周期中的潜力，并分析学生的交互模式。该教学法在两个学年中逐步演进：初始探索阶段（2024/2025学年）之后，2025/2026学年进行了修订实施，纳入了聚焦于提示工程与批判性分析的主动培训研讨会。结果表明，GenAI作为“助手”在自动化低级任务（如代码实现、调试和测试场景规范）方面极为高效，使学生得以专注于高层次的设计与决策。初步发现显示，当GenAI难以推理高级项目背景时（通常因缺乏提示编写专业能力），学生会产生挫败感。然而，后续的纠正性培训行动成功缓解了这种挫败感，显著提升了学生对GenAI生成结果的批判性解读能力以及对“幻觉”现象的控制。使用模式呈现非对称性：通用工具在早期阶段占主导，而随着项目复杂度增加，专业工具的使用逐渐增多。该实践证实了GenAI在软件工程教育中促进批判性与负责任使用的价值，支持从基础技能培养转向以分析、整合与高层问题解决为中心的范式转变。

title: NAVIGATE: Multi-Agent Graph-Based Vulnerability Detection with Adversarial Severity Assessment
authors: Yang Guo
publish: 2026 International Conference on Generative Artificial Intelligence and Information Security (GAIIS)
abstract: Automated vulnerability severity assessment is critical for prioritizing security remediation efforts, yet existing approaches face significant challenges. Traditional text-based methods rely solely on vulnerability descriptions, lacking the technical depth present in source code. Meanwhile, Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise in code understanding but struggle with long input sequences and lack structured semantic information, leading to unreliable severity predictions. This paper presents NAVIGATE, a multi-agent graph-centric framework that synergizes Code Property Graphs (CPGs) with LLM-powered reasoning for automated vulnerability severity assessment. A key innovation is the deployment of an autonomous ReAct (Reasoning + Acting) agent with a documentation subagent for dynamic query generation, enabling the discovery of complex vulnerability patterns without relying on predefined static rules. Another core contribution is the adversarial multi-agent debate mechanism using AG2 (AutoGen 2), where Security Analyst, Red Team Expert, Blue Team Expert, and Severity Judge agents engage in structured deliberation to achieve consensus-based severity ratings. Our approach employs a multi-stage pipeline comprising: (1) CPG-based code representation, (2) dual-agent vulnerability discovery with context compression, (3) dataflow-guided slicing with Tree-sitter-based syntactic reconstruction, (4) LLM-based path filtering with Top-K selection, and (5) adversarial debate for CVSS v3-aligned severity classification. Experiments on a benchmark of 594 CVEs in C/C++ demonstrate that NAVIGATE achieves a severity classification accuracy of 72.73%, F1-score of 70.0%, and MCC of 0.544. Compared to the SVACL baseline [1] (63.47% accuracy), our dataflow-guided slicing approach—which uses Joern’s inter-procedural reachableByFlows analysis to extract vulnerability-relevant code paths—improves accuracy by 9.26 percentage points.
title_zh: NAVIGATE：基于多智能体图结构的漏洞检测与对抗性严重性评估
abstract_zh: 自动化的漏洞严重性评估对于确定安全修复工作的优先级至关重要，然而现有方法面临重大挑战。传统的基于文本的方法仅依赖漏洞描述，缺乏源代码中的技术深度。与此同时，大语言模型在代码理解方面展现出潜力，但难以处理长输入序列，且缺乏结构化的语义信息，导致严重性预测不可靠。本文提出NAVIGATE——一种以图为中心的多智能体框架，将代码属性图与基于大语言模型的推理相结合，实现自动化的漏洞严重性评估。其关键创新在于部署了带有文档子智能体的自主ReAct（推理+行动）智能体，用于动态生成查询，从而无需依赖预定义的静态规则即可发现复杂漏洞模式。另一核心贡献是基于AG2的对抗性多智能体辩论机制，其中安全分析师、红队专家、蓝队专家和严重性评判智能体通过结构化讨论达成基于共识的严重性评级。我们的方法采用多阶段流水线，包括：（1）基于代码属性图的代码表示；（2）带上下文压缩的双智能体漏洞发现；（3）基于数据流导向的切分与基于Tree-sitter的句法重构；（4）基于大语言模型的路径过滤与Top-K选择；（5）面向CVSS v3对齐的严重性分类的对抗性辩论。在包含594个C/C++漏洞的基准测试上，NAVIGATE实现了72.73%的严重性分类准确率、70.0%的F1分数和0.544的马修斯相关系数。与SVACL基线（63.47%准确率）相比，我们的数据流导向切分方法——利用Joern的过程间reachableByFlows分析提取漏洞相关代码路径——将准确率提升了9.26个百分点。

title: How Software Engineers Engage with AI: A Pragmatic Workflow
authors: Vəhid Gəruslu, Zafar Jafarov, Aytan Mövsümova, Atif Namazov
publish: IEEE Software
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools such as GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT are increasingly used in software engineering (SE) for tasks such as code, test, and documentation generation. However, engineers often face uncertainty about when to trust, refine, or discard AI-generated artifacts. We present a pragmatic workflow, complemented by a four-quadrant decision model, that formalizes how developers iteratively prompt, inspect, refine, and, when needed, fall back to manual work. The workflow and decision model were derived from a grey literature review and field observations across three industrial settings in Türkiye and Azerbaijan. Two realworld scenarios demonstrate the workflow’s practical value, showing how engineers navigate key decision points when using AI. Our approach offers lightweight, semi-formalization of the decision-making process engineers already follow – implicitly or explicitly – when engaging with AI tools in everyday SE tasks, supporting more deliberate and quality-aware use of AI.".
title_zh: 软件工程师如何与AI互动：一种务实的工作流程
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）工具（如GitHub Copilot和ChatGPT）在软件工程（SE）中日益被用于代码、测试和文档生成等任务。然而，工程师们常常面临何时信任、优化或舍弃AI生成产出的不确定性。我们提出了一种实用工作流，并辅以一个四象限决策模型，该模型形式化了开发者如何迭代地进行提示、检查、优化，并在必要时回归手动操作。该工作流与决策模型源于对灰色文献的综述以及在土耳其和阿塞拜疆三个工业场景中的实地观察。两个真实场景展示了该工作流的实用价值，揭示了工程师在使用AI时如何应对关键决策点。我们的方法对工程师在日常软件工程任务中与AI工具互动时——无论隐式还是显式——所遵循的决策过程进行了轻量级、半形式化的描述，从而支持AI的更审慎和更注重质量的使用。

title: Analysis of Information Security Risks and Countermeasures in the Era of Big Data
authors: Zhoubin Teng, Qichen Lu, Zhuoyi Shen, Yaoyan Cai, Yirun Chi, Lei Zhang
publish: 2026 International Conference on Generative Artificial Intelligence and Information Security (GAIIS)
abstract: Software vulnerability management is a critical inherent part of the software development lifecycle, with organizations investing heavily in early flaw detection. As Zhejiang Province advances in-depth digital transformation, government information projects undergo increasingly frequent regular iterations. For instance, the 42 core projects operated and maintained by Zhejiang Provincial Department of Emergency Management see over 15 annual iterations on average, and traditional code security auditing models are ill-suited to this demand. Due to its lack of awareness of program runtime environments and custom sanitization functions, static analysis yields reports with persistently high false positive rates—25%-40% for mainstream market tools, and a relatively high 18%-28% even for government-customized ones. Extensive manual review is costly and time-consuming, failing to meet the security testing needs of high-frequency project updates.To address this core challenge, this paper proposes a hybrid security analysis framework designed to automatically convert candidate vulnerability sets into exploitable true positive sets with high accuracy. First, a static analysis module runs in parallel to generate candidate vulnerability sets, while an independent runtime information collection module operates to acquire actual execution contexts. Subsequently, a correlation mapping module integrates the two to produce a guidance set incorporating runtime contexts. Based on this guidance set, the system automatically generates customized attack configurations to filter out true positive sets. By calculating discrepancies between candidate vulnerability sets and true positive sets, potential false positive sets are derived, and sanitization patterns unrecognized by static analysis are extracted and fed back to the static analysis rule base. This mechanism enables continuous automated optimization of static analysis tools, effectively resolving the efficiency and accuracy dilemmas of code auditing in the iteration of government information projects and providing an efficient and scalable solution for modern code auditing and application security testing.
title_zh: 大数据时代的信息安全风险与对策分析
abstract_zh:
软件漏洞管理是软件开发生命周期中一个关键的内在组成部分，组织在早期缺陷检测上投入了大量资源。随着浙江省深入推进数字化转型，政府信息化项目迭代日益频繁。例如，浙江省应急管理厅运维的42个核心项目年均迭代超过15次，传统代码安全审计模式难以适应这一需求。由于静态分析缺乏对程序运行时环境和自定义消毒函数（sanitization functions）的感知，其生成报告的误报率居高不下——主流市场工具为25%-40%，即使是政府定制工具也高达18%-28%。大量人工复核成本高、耗时长，无法满足高频项目更新的安全测试需求。

针对这一核心挑战，本文提出一种混合安全分析框架，旨在高精度地将候选漏洞集自动转化为可利用的真阳性集（exploitable true positive sets）。首先，静态分析模块并行运行生成候选漏洞集，同时独立运行时信息收集模块获取实际执行上下文。随后，关联映射模块整合两者，生成包含运行时上下文的指导集。基于该指导集，系统自动生成定制攻击配置以筛选出真阳性集。通过计算候选漏洞集与真阳性集的差异，推导出潜在假阳性集，并提取静态分析未识别的消毒模式（sanitization patterns），反馈至静态分析规则库。该机制能够持续自动化优化静态分析工具，有效解决政府信息化项目迭代中代码审计的效率与准确性困境，为现代代码审计与应用安全测试提供高效可扩展的解决方案。

title: Dialect-Agnostic SQL Parsing via LLM-Based Segmentation
authors: Junwen An, Kabilan Mahathevan, Manuel Rigger
publish: Proceedings of the ACM on Management of Data
abstract: None
title_zh: 基于LLM分段的方言无关SQL解析
abstract_zh: 无

title: Hybrid Random Forest–Reinforcement Learning Framework for Efficient Verification of PCIe 6.0 SoC Designs
authors: Santhi K, Chellaswamy C
publish: 2026 International Conference on Smart Electronic Devices and Intelligent Systems (ICSEDIS)
abstract: The increasing complexity of high-speed System-on-Chip (SoC) interconnects, particularly with the adoption of PCI Express (PCIe) 6.0, poses significant challenges for conventional functional verification methodologies. Advanced features such as PAM4 signaling, forward error correction (FEC), and higher bandwidth demand intelligent verification strategies capable of accelerating coverage closure and improving corner-case detection. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a hybrid verification framework that integrates Random Forest–based anomaly classification with Reinforcement Learning–driven adaptive stimulus generation within a Universal Verification Methodology (UVM) environment. The Random Forest model analyzes simulation-generated protocol features to identify violations and predict coverage gaps, while the reinforcement learning agent dynamically guides stimulus generation toward high-risk and untested scenarios. Experimental evaluation on a PCIe 6.0 verification platform demonstrates that the proposed framework achieves 95–97% functional coverage, reduces simulation cycles by 25–40%, and improves anomaly detection accuracy to 92% compared to conventional and AI-only baseline approaches. By combining data-driven learning with traditional verification flows, the proposed approach offers a scalable, efficient, and practical solution for verifying next-generation high-speed SoC designs, particularly in resource-constrained verification environments.
title_zh: 混合随机森林与强化学习框架用于PCIe 6.0 SoC设计的高效验证
abstract_zh: 随着高速系统级芯片（SoC）互连复杂性的日益增加，尤其是PCI Express（PCIe）6.0的采用，传统的功能验证方法面临显著挑战。PAM4信号传输、前向纠错（FEC）以及更高带宽等先进特性，需要能够加速覆盖率收敛并提高异常场景检测能力的智能验证策略。为解决这些挑战，本文提出了一种混合验证框架，该框架在通用验证方法学（UVM）环境中集成了基于随机森林的异常分类与基于强化学习的自适应激励生成。随机森林模型通过分析仿真生成的协议特征来识别违规并预测覆盖率缺口，而强化学习代理则动态引导激励生成，针对高风险及未测试场景。在PCIe 6.0验证平台上的实验评估表明，与传统的和仅基于AI的基线方法相比，所提框架实现了95–97%的功能覆盖率，将仿真周期减少了25–40%，并将异常检测准确率提升至92%。通过将数据驱动学习与传统验证流程相结合，该方法为验证下一代高速SoC设计提供了一种可扩展、高效且实用的解决方案，尤其在资源受限的验证环境中。

title: From Generative to Agentic: A Survey of Autonomous AI Systems and Their Evolving Capabilities
authors: K. Kajol Sushmitha, N. Shanthi, M. Muthuraja, J. Gowthami, S. Jahaganapathi, V. Kamal Kishore
publish: 2026 International Conference on Smart Electronic Devices and Intelligent Systems (ICSEDIS)
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) has progressed from traditional rule-based systems that were generally not very intelligent to current advanced generative models and most recently to an even newer generation of AI called Agentic AI (or autonomous AI). Unlike traditional AI that uses pre-defined prompts to perform operations, agentic AI systems have the ability to sense their surroundings, think about their objectives, create multi-step plans and take action with very little help from people. The purpose of this paper is to provide an overview of Agentic AI; focusing on how it is structured and operates, including the types of core technologies (such as large language models (LLM), reasoning systems, memory systems, and technologies that allow agentic systems to use tools) that provide the foundation for agentic AI. In addition, important applications of agentic AI are reviewed, including, but not limited to, health care, software development, education, finance and gaming. Furthermore, the paper identifies current research issues concerning reliability, safety, governance, and ethical alignment for developing trustworthy autonomous AI systems. Finally, this paper discusses future avenues of research in developing trustworthy autonomous AI systems.
title_zh: 从生成式到代理式：自主AI系统及其演化能力综述
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）已从早期通常不太智能的传统基于规则的系统，发展到当前先进的生成式模型，并进一步迈向了被称为"智能体AI"（或称自主AI）的新一代。与使用预设指令执行操作的传统AI不同，智能体AI系统能够感知周围环境、思考自身目标、制定多步骤计划，并在极少人工干预下采取行动。本文旨在概述智能体AI，重点阐述其结构与运行机制，包括为核心智能体AI提供支撑的关键技术类型（如大语言模型、推理系统、记忆系统以及允许智能体系统使用工具的技术）。此外，本文回顾了智能体AI的重要应用，涵盖但不限于医疗保健、软件开发、教育、金融和游戏领域。同时，论文指出了当前在开发值得信赖的自主AI系统过程中，涉及可靠性、安全性、治理及伦理对齐等方面的研究问题。最后，本文探讨了未来开发值得信赖的自主AI系统的研究方向。

title: Climbing the Generative AI Mountain
authors: Jenna Butler, Mara Ulloa, Margaret-Anne Storey, Christian Bird
publish: Queue
abstract: None
title_zh: 攀登生成式AI这座高山

title: Design and Implementation of a Fault Tolerant Self-Healing Multi Train Reservation System
authors: Sashanth V, S Shrinidhi, Nivedha N, Arijit Bardhan Roy, S.S. Gayathri
publish: 2026 International Conference on Smart Electronic Devices and Intelligent Systems (ICSEDIS)
abstract: This work presents the design and implementation of a self-healing multi train reservation system developed using Verilog HDL and verified completely within the Xilinx Vivado environment. The aim of the project is to achieve autonomous fault detection, prediction and recovery in hardware-based systems. The study is based on the system reliability degradation caused by transient and operational faults. which can cause problems to real-time services which include reservation and booking systems. To overcome these issues, a layered architecture was implemented comprising a core reservation module for seat allocation and fare computation, and a self- healing control layer integrating a Fault Detection Unit (FDU), a Predictive Monitoring Unit (PMU), and a Self-Healing Controller (SHC). A dedicated Verilog-based logging module was also developed to record system behavior into a structured CSV file, enabling cycle-level event tracking and quantitative performance analysis. The system was simulated and verified using Vivado’s simulator under various testcases such as normal booking operations, fault injection scenarios and repeated fault conditions. Hardware synthesis and implementation was performed in Vivado which depicted efficiency with 4.05%LUT, 1.11%registers and total on chip power of 0.063W while the timing analysis showed zero failing endpoints and positive slack confirming real time performance. The system successfully restores its operational stability within few cycles and this framework provides a scalable and hardware efficient approach for embedding autonomous recovery mechanisms in digital systems, enhance fault tolerance and data traceability in safety critical applications.
title_zh: 容错自愈多列车预订系统的设计与实现
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了基于Verilog HDL设计并实现的一种自修复多列车预订系统，该系统在Xilinx Vivado环境中完成了完整验证。项目目标是在硬件系统中实现自主故障检测、预测与恢复。研究针对瞬态故障和操作故障导致的系统可靠性下降问题展开——这类故障会引发实时服务（如预订和订票系统）的异常。为解决这些问题，系统采用分层架构：核心预订模块负责座位分配与票价计算，自修复控制层集成故障检测单元（FDU）、预测监控单元（PMU）和自修复控制器（SHC）。此外，还开发了专用Verilog日志模块，将系统行为记录为结构化CSV文件，支持周期级事件追踪与定量性能分析。系统在Vivado模拟器中针对正常订票操作、故障注入场景及重复故障条件等多种测试用例进行了仿真与验证。在Vivado中完成硬件综合与实现后，结果显示效率达4.05%的LUT、1.11%的寄存器资源占用，总片内功耗为0.063W；时序分析显示零失败端点且余量为正，确认满足实时性能要求。系统可在数个周期内恢复运行稳定性，该框架为在数字系统中嵌入自主恢复机制提供了一种可扩展且硬件高效的方法，增强了安全关键应用中的容错能力与数据可追溯性。

title: Exploiting Formal Verification for the Systematic Discovery of Corner Cases in a Behavior Planner for Automated Driving
authors: Lukas König, Franziska Henze, Christian Heinzemann, Michaela Klauck, Alberto Griggio, Stefano Tonetta, Alessandro Cimatti
publish: IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems
abstract: In automated driving, preventing hazardous driving decisions is both an extremely important and intricate task. Typical verification and validation methods include extensive simulation and real-world testing which is expensive and, yet, cannot rule out rare but potentially hazardous corner cases. Therefore, we present an approach to enhance the verification and validation process of automated driving by applying formal verification techniques for bug finding directly to the code of a tactical behavior planner in series development. We use an open source software framework in combination with the model checker nuXmv. Our framework involves fully automatically extracting the model from C++ code, integrating it with a traffic simulator, and conducting exhaustive analysis over a broad range of possible traffic scenes using model checking. If violations, e. g., crashes, are detected, traces of the surrounding traffic participants and ego are obtained, which can be simulated with the full system to aid in error identification, or utilized to generate corner cases for conventional testing. Since model checking is usually runtime-intensive, we analyze the effects of different discretization step sizes for time and space. Our results show that the toolchain identifies formerly unknown bugs in a real series development, even with surprisingly coarse discretizations. This demonstrates that model checking can improve the development process of industrial ADAS projects.
title_zh: 利用形式化验证系统性发现自动驾驶行为规划器中的边缘案例
abstract_zh: 在自动驾驶中，防止具有危险性的驾驶决策既是一项极其重要又复杂的任务。典型的验证与确认方法包括大量仿真和真实道路测试，这些方法成本高昂，却仍无法排除罕见但存在潜在危险的边界情况。为此，我们提出了一种增强自动驾驶验证与确认流程的方法：将形式化验证技术直接应用于系列化开发中战术行为规划器的代码进行缺陷检测。我们结合使用了开源软件框架与模型检验器 nuXmv。所提出的框架能够从 C++ 代码中全自动提取模型，将其与交通模拟器集成，并利用模型检验对广泛可能的交通场景进行穷举分析。若检测到违规行为（例如碰撞），则可获取周围交通参与者及自车的轨迹，这些轨迹可在完整系统中进行仿真，以辅助错误识别，或用于生成传统测试中的边界情况。由于模型检验通常运行时开销较大，我们分析了不同时间和空间离散化步长的影响。结果表明，该工具链能够在真实的系列开发中识别出此前未知的缺陷，即使采用极粗略的离散化也不例外。这证明了模型检验能够改进工业级 ADAS 项目的开发流程。

title: ParaVul: A Parallel Large Language Model and Retrieval-Augmented Framework for Smart Contract Vulnerability Detection
authors: Tenghui Huang, Jinbo Wen, Jiawen Kang, Siyong Chen, Zhengtao Li, Tao Zhang, Dongning Liu, Jiacheng Wang, Chengjun Cai, Yinqiu Liu
publish: IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security
abstract: Smart contracts play a significant role in automating blockchain services. Nevertheless, vulnerabilities in smart contracts pose serious threats to blockchain security. Currently, traditional detection methods primarily rely on static analysis and formal verification, which can result in high false-positive rates and poor scalability. Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently made significant progress in smart contract vulnerability detection. However, they still face challenges such as high inference costs and substantial computational overhead. In this paper, we propose ParaVul, a parallel LLM and retrievalaugmented framework to improve the reliability and accuracy of smart contract vulnerability detection. Specifically, we first develop Sparse Low-Rank Adaptation (SLoRA), a technique for efficient LLM fine-tuning tailored to smart contract vulnerability detection. Distinct from existing LoRA methods, SLoRA inserts parallel sparse and low-rank branches after the attention projection and the feed-forward block, enabling LLMs to capture both global code semantics and localized vulnerability patterns while maintaining low training overhead. We then construct a vulnerability contract knowledge base and develop a hybrid Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system that integrates Okapi BM25 with dense retrieval to provide complementary lexical and semantic evidence for smart contract vulnerability verification. Furthermore, we propose a meta-learner-based gated verification module to fuse the outputs of the SLoRA detector and the two RAG-based detectors, thereby generating the final detection results. After completing vulnerability detection, we design chain-of-thought prompts to guide LLMs to generate comprehensive vulnerability detection reports. Simulation results demonstrate the superiority of ParaVul, especially in terms of F1 scores, achieving 0.9398 for single-label detection and 0.9930 for multi-label detection.
title_zh: ParaVul：一种用于智能合约漏洞检测的并行大语言模型与检索增强框架
abstract_zh: 智能合约在自动化区块链服务中发挥着重要作用。然而，智能合约中的漏洞对区块链安全构成了严重威胁。当前，传统检测方法主要依赖静态分析和形式化验证，这可能导致高误报率和可扩展性差。大型语言模型（LLM）近期在智能合约漏洞检测方面取得了显著进展，但仍面临推理成本高和计算开销大等挑战。本文提出ParaVul——一种并行LLM与检索增强框架，旨在提升智能合约漏洞检测的可靠性和准确性。具体而言，我们首先开发了稀疏低秩适配（SLoRA）技术，这是一种针对智能合约漏洞检测的高效LLM微调方法。与现有的LoRA方法不同，SLoRA在注意力投影和前馈模块之后插入并行稀疏低秩分支，使LLM在保持低训练开销的同时，既能捕捉全局代码语义，又能捕获局部漏洞模式。随后，我们构建了漏洞合约知识库，并开发了混合检索增强生成（RAG）系统，该系统融合了Okapi BM25与稠密检索，为智能合约漏洞验证提供互补的词汇和语义证据。此外，我们提出了基于元学习器的门控验证模块，用于融合SLoRA检测器与两个基于RAG的检测器的输出，从而生成最终检测结果。完成漏洞检测后，我们设计了链式思维提示，引导LLM生成全面的漏洞检测报告。仿真结果证明了ParaVul的优越性，尤其在F1分数方面，单标签检测达到0.9398，多标签检测达到0.9930。

title: Practical LLM-Based Function-Level Automated Program Repair: How Far Are We?
authors: Jiahong Xiang, Xiaoyang Xu, Fanchu Kong, Mingyuan Wu, Zizheng Zhan, Haotian Zhang, Yuqun Zhang
publish: ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology
abstract: None
title_zh: 实用的基于大语言模型的函数级自动程序修复：我们走到了哪一步？
abstract_zh: 无

title: Code-Collaborative Intelligent Query Generation Technology for Complex Relational Data
authors: Chanjuan Tang, Zhongtian Lu, Xinqi Wang, Zhengtao Wang, Guanying Li
publish: 2026 International Conference on Generative Artificial Intelligence and Information Security (GAIIS)
abstract: Natural language query generation for complex graph-structured data faces challenges in domain-specific settings. Existing large language Mmdels (LLMs) often suffer from logical gaps when handling complex relational queries. To address these issues, this paper proposes a Code-Collaborative Intelligent Query Generation Framework. The framework leverages the sensitivity of Code LLMs to formal logic to parse complex topological dependencies. First, the study introduces a Dual-View Graph Representation mechanism. This mechanism constructs an object-oriented code view alongside a lightweight dictionary view. It transforms graph schema constraints into type-checking logic executable by the model, thereby mitigating structural hallucinations. Second, the paper designs a Structured Logic Planning (SLP) protocol. This protocol decouples unstructured natural language into explicit reasoning steps: path determination, semantic extraction, and schema mapping. The research further employs LoRA to fine-tune the DeepSeek-Coder backbone, enabling the model to internalize the structured reasoning paradigm. Experimental results on the constructed CRD-Instruct dataset demonstrate the superiority of the method. The model achieves a ROUGE-L score of 69.86%. It outperforms the untuned general baseline by approximately 27%. These results validate the accuracy and robustness of the approach in complex Text-to-Cypher generation tasks.
title_zh: 面向复杂关系数据的代码协同智能查询生成技术
abstract_zh: 针对复杂图结构数据的自然语言查询生成在特定领域场景中面临挑战。现有的大语言模型在处理复杂关系查询时常出现逻辑断层。为解决这些问题，本文提出了一种代码协同智能查询生成框架。该框架利用代码大语言模型对形式逻辑的敏感性来解析复杂的拓扑依赖关系。首先，研究引入了双视图图表示机制。该机制构建面向对象的代码视图和轻量级字典视图，将图结构约束转化为模型可执行的类型检查逻辑，从而缓解结构幻觉问题。其次，本文设计了结构化逻辑规划协议。该协议将非结构化自然语言解耦为显式推理步骤：路径确定、语义提取和模式映射。研究进一步采用LoRA微调DeepSeek-Coder骨干模型，使其内化结构化推理范式。在构建的CRD-Instruct数据集上的实验结果表明了该方法的优越性。模型的ROUGE-L分数达到69.86%，比未调优的通用基线模型高出约27%。这些结果验证了该方法在复杂文本到Cypher生成任务中的准确性和鲁棒性。

title: Corrective Distillation: Mitigating Catastrophic Forgetting in LLM Fine-Tuning via External Correction of Self-Generated Errors
authors: Jianchun Jiang, Yingfei Qu, Hui Li
publish: 2026 International Conference on Generative Artificial Intelligence and Information Security (GAIIS)
abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) for downstream tasks often results in a significant decline in their general capabilities and safety alignment. This issue is typically attributed to a mismatch in distribution between the task-specific data and the model’s original training data. Self-distillation methods aim to address this issue by preserving the model’s own output distribution. However, their effectiveness is limited when the model itself produces erroneous reasoning or answers. In this study, we propose a simple yet effective framework, "Corrective Distillation" (CD), that leverages a more powerful external language model to optimize the seed model's outputs. Rather than completely rewriting the responses, the external model focuses on correcting factual and logical errors while largely preserving the original style. These corrected outputs are then used as supervision signals for further fine-tuning. We evaluated CD on the Llama-3-8B-Instruct model across multiple tasks, including mathematical reasoning, code generation, and tool usage. The results demonstrate that, compared to standard fine-tuning and self-distillation, CD enhances task performance while better preserving the model’s general capabilities. Furthermore, we observed that this method helps maintain safety-related behaviors and, in some cases, even slightly improves them. Overall, CD offers a practical method for improving task-specific performance without significantly compromising the model’s original alignment.
title_zh: 纠正性蒸馏：通过外部纠正自生成错误以缓解大语言模型微调中的灾难性遗忘
abstract_zh: 在对大型语言模型进行下游任务的微调时，其通用能力和安全对齐水平往往会出现显著下降。这一问题通常归因于任务特定数据与模型原始训练数据之间的分布不匹配。自蒸馏方法旨在通过保留模型自身的输出分布来解决此问题，但当模型本身产生错误推理或答案时，其效果有限。在本研究中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的框架——"纠正式蒸馏"（CD），该方法利用更强大的外部语言模型来优化种子模型的输出。外部模型并非完全重写回复，而是专注于纠正事实性错误和逻辑性错误，同时尽可能保留原有风格。这些修正后的输出随后被用作进一步微调的监督信号。我们在Llama-3-8B-Instruct模型上对CD进行了评估，涉及数学推理、代码生成和工具使用等多个任务。结果表明，与标准微调和自蒸馏相比，CD在提升任务性能的同时，更好地保留了模型的通用能力。此外，我们观察到该方法有助于维持安全相关行为，在某些情况下甚至略有改善。总体而言，CD提供了一种实用方法，在不显著牺牲模型原始对齐水平的前提下，提升特定任务的表现。

title: Multi-View Graph-Based Code Representation Learning for Vulnerability Detection
authors: Zheng Yuan, Chun Shan, Pengzhe Heng
publish: 2026 International Conference on Generative Artificial Intelligence and Information Security (GAIIS)
abstract: Vulnerability detection is essential for ensuring software reliability and security. Existing learning-based approaches often fail to fully capture fine-grained program semantics and heterogeneous structural dependencies. In particular, directly merging different code representations into a unified graph may introduce semantic ambiguity and weaken vulnerability-specific signals. To address this issue, we propose SMGCN, a semantic-aware multi-view graph framework for vulnerability detection. SMGCN independently models abstract syntax, control flow, and data flow as separate graph views, preserving their structural characteristics. A node importance recalibration mechanism is introduced to emphasize vulnerability-relevant nodes, and an attention-based fusion module adaptively integrates multi-view representations into a unified embedding for classification. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets demonstrate that SMGCN consistently outperforms representative learning-based and LLM-based baselines, achieving average improvements of 7.18% in accuracy and 11.0% in F1-score. Additional analyses further validate the effectiveness of multi-view modeling and node importance calibration. These results highlight the advantage of semantic-aware multi-view graph learning for robust vulnerability detection.
title_zh: 多视图基于图的代码表示学习用于漏洞检测
abstract_zh: 漏洞检测对于确保软件的可靠性和安全性至关重要。现有的基于学习的方法往往无法充分捕获细粒度的程序语义和异构的结构依赖性。特别是，将不同的代码表示直接合并到统一图中可能会引入语义模糊性，并削弱漏洞相关的特定信号。为了解决这一问题，我们提出了SMGCN——一种用于漏洞检测的语义感知多视图图框架。SMGCN将抽象语法、控制流和数据流独立建模为不同的图视图，保留它们的结构特征。引入了一种节点重要性重新校准机制，以突出与漏洞相关的节点，并采用基于注意力的融合模块，将多视图表示自适应地整合为统一的嵌入表示，用于分类。在四个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，SMGCN始终优于代表性的基于学习和基于大语言模型的基线方法，平均准确率提升7.18%，F1分数提升11.0%。进一步的分析也验证了多视图建模和节点重要性校准的有效性。这些结果突显了语义感知多视图图学习在稳健漏洞检测中的优势。

title: Configuration-Aware Automated Design of Single-Stage BJT Amplifiers using Supervised Regression
authors: Manoj Shridhar Gudi, Vandith Yeri, Shantanu Patil, Sujata Patil
publish: 2026 International Conference on Smart Electronic Devices and Intelligent Systems (ICSEDIS)
abstract: Designing an analog amplifier involves many subtle trade-offs. This paper introduces a framework that uses data and takes configuration into account for the automated design of single-stage BJT amplifiers. Unlike traditional methods that treat all amplifier topologies the same, this approach clearly distinguishes between Common Emitter (CE), Common Collector (CC), and Common Gate (CG) configurations. For CE amplifiers, the framework achieves high predictive accuracy (R<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup> =0.886). In contrast, CC and CG configurations show negative R<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup> values due to similar designs for each configuration, which reflect basic circuit-level uncertainties rather than issues with the model itself. The results offer valuable insights into when machine learning can be useful in analog circuit design. They also point out the physical limits of methods based on regression. The framework includes E24 resistor standardization and automated schematic generation.
title_zh: 基于监督回归的配置感知单级BJT放大器自动化设计
abstract_zh: 设计模拟放大器涉及许多微妙的权衡。本文介绍了一个框架，该框架利用数据并考虑配置，以实现单级BJT放大器的自动化设计。与将所有放大器拓扑结构同等对待的传统方法不同，该方法明确区分了共发射极（CE）、共集极（CC）和共栅极（CG）配置。对于CE放大器，该框架实现了较高的预测精度（R²=0.886）。相比之下，CC和CG配置显示出负的R²值，因为每种配置的设计相似，这反映了基本的电路级不确定性，而非模型本身的问题。这些结果为我们深入了解机器学习何时在模拟电路设计中发挥作用提供了宝贵见解，同时也揭示了基于回归方法的物理局限性。该框架包括E24电阻标准化和自动原理图生成。

title: A Time-Decay-Based Recommendation Algorithm for Vulnerability Fixers
authors: Jiayin Wei, Ting Liang, Jianqiang Han, Lin Yao
publish: 2026 International Conference on Generative Artificial Intelligence and Information Security (GAIIS)
abstract: Existing vulnerability fixer recommendation methods typically match vulnerabilities with fixers based on the similarity between vulnerabilities and fixers derived from historical fixing records. However, these approaches suffer from two main limitations: they fail to account for the temporal dynamics of fixer expertise reflected in time-varying characteristics, and they overlook the collaborative relationships among vulnerability fixers. To address these issues, this paper proposes a time-decay-based vulnerability fixer recommendation model. First, a vulnerability–fixer bipartite graph is constructed, in which collaborative relationships among fixers are explicitly incorporated into the graph structure. Second, a modified Ebbinghaus forgetting function is introduced to apply temporal decay to the vulnerabilities previously fixed by each fixer, assigning higher weights to more recent interactions. This design effectively captures the evolution of fixer expertise over time. Finally, a lightweight graph convolutional network (LightGCN) is employed to learn more comprehensive vulnerability and fixer representations, which are then used for recommendation, enabling the selection of fixers that better meet real-world vulnerability fixing requirements. Extensive comparative experiments are conducted on three public datasets—EclipseJDT, LibreOffice, and Mozilla. The experimental results demonstrate that incorporating temporal information significantly improves the effectiveness of vulnerability fixer recommendation, leading to recommendations that better align with the actual fixing needs of vulnerabilities.
title_zh: 一种基于时间衰减的漏洞修复者推荐算法
abstract_zh: 现有的漏洞修复者推荐方法通常基于历史修复记录中漏洞与修复者之间的相似性来匹配漏洞与修复者。然而，这些方法存在两个主要局限：它们未能考虑修复者专业能力随时间变化的动态特性，并且忽略了漏洞修复者之间的协作关系。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种基于时间衰减的漏洞修复者推荐模型。首先，构建了一个漏洞-修复者二分图，其中修复者之间的协作关系被显式地纳入图结构中。其次，引入了一种改进的艾宾浩斯遗忘函数，对每个修复者先前修复的漏洞施加时间衰减，为最近的交互赋予更高的权重。这种设计有效捕捉了修复者专业能力随时间的变化。最后，采用轻量级图卷积网络（LightGCN）学习更全面的漏洞和修复者表示，然后用于推荐，从而能够选择更符合实际漏洞修复需求的修复者。在三个公共数据集——EclipseJDT、LibreOffice和Mozilla——上进行了广泛的对比实验。实验结果表明，融入时间信息显著提高了漏洞修复者推荐的效果，使得推荐结果更符合漏洞的实际修复需求。

title: ML-based Abstract Power Modeling for Embedded System Processors
authors: Katayoon Basharkhah, Zainalabedin Navabi
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: System-level power analysis is a critical requirement in modern embedded systems and mobile devices. This work focuses on enabling detailed power estimation for embedded processor cores within a core-based system-level design environment. Traditional RTL or gate-level simulation, while accurate, is too slow to support early system level decision making. To address this limitation, power modeling has emerged as a promising but challenging solution. This work introduces a novel, automated methodology for fast and cycle-accurate power modeling of embedded processor cores. The key innovation lies in using a minimal feature set mainly based on processor control signals, which significantly reduces modeling overhead. To ensure generality, we employ a residual-based model that combines linear regression and decision tree techniques to capture residual error information, making the model highly adaptive to unseen data. To obtain a power model, we explore the modeling space across various modeling alternatives, evaluating their performance in terms of accuracy and modeling effort. Experimental results demonstrate that our model achieves a cycle-by-cycle power prediction error of less than 3% and a simulation speed of 6.6 Mcycles/s. The proposed methodology is integrated within an automated framework, streamlining both dataset generation and model training processes. This automation ensures efficiency and scalability, significantly reducing manual effort for the IP developer.
title_zh: 基于机器学习的嵌入式系统处理器抽象功耗建模
abstract_zh: 系统级功耗分析是现代嵌入式系统和移动设备中的关键需求。本文聚焦于在基于内核的系统级设计环境中实现嵌入式处理器内核的详细功耗估算。传统的寄存器传输级（RTL）或门级仿真虽然精确，但速度过慢，无法支持早期的系统级决策。为解决这一局限，功耗建模应运而生，成为一种有前景但具有挑战性的解决方案。本文提出了一种新颖的自动化方法，用于快速且周期精确地建模嵌入式处理器内核的功耗。其核心创新在于使用主要基于处理器控制信号的最小特征集，从而显著降低建模开销。为确保通用性，我们采用了一种结合线性回归和决策树技术的残差模型来捕获残差误差信息，使模型对未见数据具有高度适应性。为获得功耗模型，我们探索了多种建模方案的空间，并从精度和建模工作量方面评估其性能。实验结果表明，我们的模型实现了周期级功耗预测误差低于3%，仿真速度达到6.6 百万周期/秒。所提出的方法已集成至自动化框架中，简化了数据集生成和模型训练流程。这种自动化保证了效率和可扩展性，显著减少了IP开发人员的手动工作。

title: LIMCA: LLM for Automating Analog In-Memory Computing Architecture Design Exploration
authors: Deepak Vungarala, Md Hasibul Amin, Pietro Mercati, Arnob Ghosh, Arman Roohi, David Z. Pan, Ramtin Zand, Shaahin Angizi
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: In this paper, we introduce LIMCA, a novel fine-tuning-free Large Language Model (LLM)-driven framework for automating the design and evaluation of In-Memory Computing (IMC) crossbar architectures. Unlike traditional approaches, where the manual, knowledge-intensive design process and the lack of high-quality circuit netlists have significantly constrained Design Space Exploration (DSE) and optimization to behavioral system-level tools, LIMCA employs a No-Human-In-Loop (NHIL) automated pipeline to generate and validate circuit netlists for SPICE simulations, eliminating manual intervention. LIMCA systematically explores the IMC design space by leveraging a structured dataset and LLM-based performance evaluation. Our experimental results on MNIST classification demonstrate that LIMCA successfully generates crossbar designs achieving ≥96% accuracy while maintaining a power consumption ≤3W, making this the first work in LLM-assisted IMC DSE. Compared to existing frameworks, LIMCA provides an automated, scalable, and hardware-aware solution, reducing design exploration time while ensuring user-constrained performance trade-offs. Artifacts are open-sourced at https://github.com/ACADLab/LIMCA.
title_zh: LIMCA：用于自动化模拟存内计算架构设计探索的大语言模型
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了LIMCA，一种新颖的**无微调**大型语言模型（LLM）驱动框架，用于自动化设计和评估内存内计算（IMC）交叉开关架构。与传统方法不同——传统方法依赖人工、知识密集型设计过程，且缺乏高质量电路网表，严重限制了设计空间探索（DSE）及基于行为级系统工具的优化——LIMCA采用**无人工干预（NHIL）**自动化流水线生成和验证用于SPICE仿真的电路网表，消除了人工操作。LIMCA通过利用结构化数据集和基于LLM的性能评估，系统性地探索IMC设计空间。我们在MNIST分类上的实验结果表明，LIMCA成功生成了准确率≥96%、功耗≤3W的交叉开关设计，这是LLM辅助IMC DSE领域的首项工作。与现有框架相比，LIMCA提供了一种自动化、可扩展且硬件感知的解决方案，在确保用户约束性能权衡的同时，缩短了设计探索时间。相关开源成果见https://github.com/ACADLab/LIMCA。

title: VulD-SRCM: A Source Code Vulnerability Detection Model Based on Semantic Residual Compensation
authors: Mengjia Li, Weiyu Dong
publish: 2026 International Conference on Generative Artificial Intelligence and Information Security (GAIIS)
abstract: To address the limitations of vulnerability detection methods based on deep learning, specifically the oversmoothing of representations and the loss of fine grained semantic features that arise during multi-layer Transformer encoding, this paper proposes VulD-SRCM, a source code vulnerability detection model grounded in semantic residual compensation. The proposed model employs GraphCodeBERT as its foundational encoder, achieving multimodal code representation through the joint modeling of token sequences and data flow graphs. Furthermore, a semantic residual compensation module is introduced to mitigate the phenomenon of deep representational convergence, thereby preserving critical discriminative features. Experimental evaluations conducted on three publicly available vulnerability detection benchmarks, namely Big-Vul, Devign, and Real-Vul, demonstrate that VulD-SRCM consistently outperforms existing baseline methods across multiple evaluation metrics, including accuracy, recall, F1-score, and false positive rate, exhibiting robust generalization capability and considerable practical utility.
title_zh: VulD-SRCM：基于语义残差补偿的源代码漏洞检测模型
abstract_zh: 针对基于深度学习的漏洞检测方法存在的局限性，即多层Transformer编码过程中产生的表示过平滑及细粒度语义特征丢失问题，本文提出了一种基于语义残差补偿的源代码漏洞检测模型VulD-SRCM。该模型以GraphCodeBERT为基础编码器，通过联合建模令牌序列与数据流图，实现多模态代码表示。此外，引入语义残差补偿模块以缓解深度表示收敛现象，从而保留关键判别特征。在Big-Vul、Devign和Real-Vul三个公开漏洞检测基准数据集上的实验评估表明，VulD-SRCM在准确率、召回率、F1分数及假阳性率等多个评估指标上均持续优于现有基线方法，展现出强大的泛化能力及显著的实际应用价值。
